svg.text: NoC C++ Behavior Model — Platform Diagram
(0,0) = Gateway Node — Host DMA injection point (configurable)
▸ NI & Router: independently C++ or RTL
6. Dst Router → Dst NI: Flit → AXI
Flow Control: VALID_READY 或 CREDIT — compile-time template parameter (like RTL generate)
Flit: 408-bit (Header 56b + Payload 352b) · Dual-rail: REQ + RSP physical channels
Injection: HOST_DMA (via gateway) 或 DIRECT_PE (distributed to each node's NI)
cycle-accurate + bit-exact: Memory State + Response Log
